debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
β : Type u_2
n : ℕ
v : Vector α n
f : α → β
⊢ Vector.mapIdx (fun x => f) v = Vector.map f v

failed_attempts:
rcases v with ⟨l, rfl⟩
      apply Subtype.eq
      simp [Vector.mapIdx, Vector.map]
      induction l with
      | nil => rfl
      | cons x xs ih =>
        simp [List.mapIdx, List.map, ih]

rcases v with ⟨l, rfl⟩
      simp only [Vector.mapIdx, Vector.map]
      induction l with
      | nil => rfl
      | cons hd tl HR =>
        simp only [List.mapFinIdx_cons, List.map_cons, HR]
induction v using Vector.inductionOn <;> simp [Vector.mapIdx, Vector.map, *]

induction v using Vector.inductionOn with
      | nil => rfl
      | cons x xs ih => simp [Vector.mapIdx, Vector.map, ih]

cases v
      dsimp [Vector.mapIdx, Vector.map]
      congr
      rename_i l _
      induction l with
      | nil => rfl
      | cons x xs ih =>
        simp only [List.mapFinIdx_cons, List.map_cons, ih]

induction v using Vector.inductionOn with
      | nil => rfl
      | cons x xs ih =>
        simp [Vector.mapIdx, Vector.map, ih]

rcases v with ⟨l, h⟩
      simp [Vector.mapIdx, Vector.map]
      induction l <;> simp [List.mapFinIdx_cons, *]

induction v using Vector.inductionOn
      · rfl
      · simp [Vector.mapIdx, Vector.map, *]

induction v using Vector.inductionOn with
      | nil => rfl
      | cons x xs ih => simp [Vector.mapIdx, Vector.map, ih]
induction v using Vector.inductionOn <;> simp [Vector.mapIdx, Vector.map, *]

rcases v with ⟨l, _⟩
      simp [Vector.mapIdx, Vector.map]
      induction l <;> simp [List.map_cons, List.mapIdx_cons, List.mapFinIdx_cons, *]

rcases v with ⟨l, rfl⟩
      simp only [Vector.mapIdx, Vector.map]
      congr
      induction l <;> simp [List.mapFinIdx_cons, *]

apply Vector.eq
      intro i
      simp [Vector.get_mapIdx, Vector.get_map]
